name: Quality Overview
description: Compute per-sample FASTQ statistics and generate an HTML summary report

inputs.name: Linked FASTQ files
inputs.description: FASTQ files linked to study samples
inputs.sourceDescription: Read records linked to selected study samples

outputs.name: Per-sample statistics
outputs.description: TSV file with read statistics for each sample
outputs.destinationDescription: Stored as a run artifact for review and download

outputs.name: Summary TSV
outputs.destinationDescription: Stored as a run artifact for download

outputs.name: HTML summary report
outputs.description: Interactive HTML report with per-sample statistics and quality overview
outputs.destinationDescription: Stored as a run artifact for review

steps.name: Compute statistics
steps.description: Run seqkit on each sample to compute read statistics

steps.name: Collect statistics
steps.description: Merge per-sample statistics into a single summary

steps.name: Generate report
steps.description: Create an HTML summary report from the collected statistics
